description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 28-31.

Level 22

Bulwark of Constitution

Beginning at 22nd level, increase your Constitution score by 2. You increase your Constitution score by an additional 2 when you reach 24th level.

Barbaric Leap

Also at 22nd level, you learn to use your strength to your benefit when crossing large distances. You leap into the skies, descending onto a point you can see within 500 feet of you. All creatures within 20 feet of that point when you land must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw against your Strength score, taking 45 (10d8) bludgeoning damage and being knocked prone on a failed save, or taking half as much damage and not being knocked prone on a successful one. When using this feature, you don’t take fall damage when falling 500 feet or less.

LP Cost. You can use this feature as a bonus action on your turn. If you do so, you expend 1 Legendary Point.

Legendary Rage

Whenever you enter a rage, you can expend 1 Legendary Point to gain 100 temporary hit points that last for a minute. Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a long rest.

5.5e: When using your Legendary Rage, you can expend additional Rage uses to increase the temporary hit points you gain. For each Rage use you expend, you gain an additional 20 temporary hit points, up to a maximum of 100. This cap is removed when you gain the Improved Legendary Rage feature at 25th level.

Also, when you reach 22nd level, and again at 24th level, you gain an additional use of your Rage feature.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
